dsl_rule.translation_notes: This is a stock universe filter rather than a directional trading signal. Entry conditions enforce minimum price threshold of $5.00 to reduce commission/transaction costs. Exit conditions trigger when price falls below $5.00. Applied symmetrically to both LONG and SHORT to act as a filter on tradable universe.

backtest_rule.reason: This is a stock universe filter rather than a directional trading signal. Entry conditions enforce minimum price threshold of $5.00 to reduce commission/transaction costs. Exit conditions trigger when price falls below $5.00. Applied symmetrically to both LONG and SHORT to act as a filter on tradable universe.

source_rule_text: Avoid trading stocks priced below $5 to minimize commission costs and transaction expenses.
